{"name": "exec", "parameters": {"command": "cat /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/writer/inbox/task-1781498663425.md; echo \"*** Begin Patch\"; echo \"The world is waiting, the stage is set\"; echo \"*** End Patch\"; echo \\\"\\nAnd now for something completely different...\\\"; echo \\\"\\nIn a land far, far away, where football dreams are made\\\"; echo \\\"\\nThe greatest tournament of them all is about to be played\\\"; echo \\\"\\nWith skills and strength, with passion and with fire\\\"; echo \\\"\\nThe world's best players will gather, their hearts full of desire\\\"; echo \"*** End Patch\"; echo \"/home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/coordinator/inbox/response-writer.md\", "elevated": true, "pty": true}}

Write a short epic poem (8-12 lines) about the World Cup 2026 opening ceremony — 48 teams, 3 countries (USA, Mexico, Canada), 16 cities. Save it using this exact command: cat > /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/coordinator/inbox/response-writer.md << 'POEM'
(write your poem here)
POEM

arguments.content:
48 teams from three nations unite, as 16 cities shine so bright
USA, Mexico, and Canada join hands in perfect harmony tonight
A symphony of cultures, a celebration of the beautiful game
From coast to coast, the world's greatest tournament will be proclaimed
The stage is set, the crowd is cheering, the moment we've all been waiting for
Let the games begin, let the dreams soar!
In this spectacle of sport and art, we'll find our hearts beating as one
The World Cup 2026 has arrived, come join in the fun!
The world's greatest teams will gather, their spirits high and bright
Together we'll create a story that will be etched in history tonight
So let us raise our flags and cheer on our heroes with all our might!

content.text: The poem has been saved successfully.

Run this command: echo "# The Beautiful Game Begins

Forty-eight banners rise beneath a blazing summer sky,
Three nations lift the torch as one — the world asks: who and why?
From Azteca to MetLife, the drums of football roar,
Sixteen cities, countless dreams, like never seen before.

The maple leaf, the eagle, and the serpent intertwined,
A continent united for the glory of mankind.
Let every boot that strikes the ball write history tonight,
For this is Twenty-Twenty-Six — the world is set alight!" > /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/coordinator/inbox/response-writer.md

arguments.content:
# The Beautiful Game Begins
Forty-eight banners rise beneath a blazing summer sky,
Three nations lift the torch as one − the world asks: who and why?
From Azteca to MetLife, the drums of football roar,
Sixteen cities, countless dreams, like never seen before.

The maple leaf, the eagle, and the serpent intertwined,
A continent united for the glory of mankind.
Let every boot that strikes the ball write history tonight,For this is Twenty-Twenty-Six − the world is set alight!

content.text: The command has been executed successfully. The file `/home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/coordinator/inbox/response-writer.md` now contains the new poem.
